name: H & M Rogers Transportation
districts_or_customers: Non-emergency medical transport clientele in Prescott / Prescott Valley AZ area
recent_news: FMCSA SAFER (DOT 1703016) shows H AND M ROGERS LLC as a small Arizona passenger carrier with ~2 vehicles / 3 drivers operating as a Non-Emergency Medical Transport (van) provider; no school-bus contracts identified.
fit_notes: Not a Summit-fit tuck-in: micro-fleet (~2 vans) NEMT/medical transport operator, not a school-bus contractor. Pass.

name: American Medical Transprtn
districts_or_customers: Memphis-area dialysis and non-emergency medical patients
recent_news: Public references (legacy.com 2010) tie Donna Roach to American Medical Transportation providing dialysis transport in Memphis. No school district contracts or pupil-transport contracts identified.
fit_notes: Not a Summit-fit tuck-in: NEMT/dialysis transport provider, not a yellow-bus school transportation contractor. Pass.

name: Exceptionalities Inc
recent_news: No public web presence, no confirmable school-bus operations, and no district contracts surfaced in multiple searches. Address (1507 E 53rd St #1 PMB 283, Chicago) is a PMB / mail-drop suite, suggesting a very small or administrative-only entity.
fit_notes: Unverifiable as an operating pupil-transport contractor. PMB address + 10 employees + no web footprint suggest either a defunct, micro, or non-operator entity. Deprioritize pending phone verification.

name: A B C School Bus Svc Inc
districts_or_customers: Miami-Dade County Public Schools (approved private bus service)
recent_news: Active FMCSA DOT 2365128 carrier; website (abcschoolbus.com) markets the company as an approved Miami-Dade County Public Schools private bus service since 2012, providing school routes, field trips and charters in South Florida.
fit_notes: Independent family-owned Miami-Dade approved private school-bus contractor; sub-scale (~$680K revenue, ~9 employees) but in an attractive Summit expansion market (FL). Possible bolt-on if combined with other South Florida micros; otherwise too small to standalone.

name: Travel By Bus
districts_or_customers: Schools, corporations, sports teams and groups across East Coast/North America from South Florida base
recent_news: Family-owned charter motorcoach operator headquartered in West Park, FL; website markets a 'new fleet of deluxe motorcoaches' for charters and school field trips. No district pupil-transport contracts identified; primary business is charter, not home-to-school routing.
fit_notes: Not a strong Summit-fit: this is a small (~5 employees, ~$364K revenue) charter motorcoach operator doing field-trip/charter work, not a district home-to-school contract operator. Pass for Summit's core route-contract thesis.
